policy: Use only a portrait visibly identified on an official government or official officeholder page. Keep the source page with the image record and reject logos, seals, banners, placeholders, and generic social cards.

photos.name: Jacky Rosen
photos.sourceName: Office of U.S. Senator Jacky Rosen
photos.validationNote: Portrait is the lead image on Senator Rosen's official biography page and is identified by that page's title and surrounding biography.
